args.query:
WITH book_publication_decade AS (
    SELECT 
        book_id, 
        CASE 
            WHEN POSITION('Published by' IN details) > 0 THEN 
                CAST(SUBSTRING(details FROM '(19|20)\d{2}') AS INTEGER) 
            WHEN POSITION('released on' IN details) > 0 THEN 
                CAST(SUBSTRING(details FROM '(19|20)\d{2}') AS INTEGER)
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS publication_year
    FROM books_info
),
decade_ratings AS (
    SELECT 
        FLOOR(publication_year / 10) * 10 AS publication_decade,
        r.rating,
        b.book_id
    FROM book_publication_decade b
    JOIN review_database.review r ON regexp_replace(b.book_id, 'bookid_', '') = regexp_replace(r.purchase_id, 'purchaseid_', '')
    WHERE publication_year IS NOT NULL
),
decade_book_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        publication_decade,
        COUNT(DISTINCT book_id) AS unique_book_count,
        AVG(rating) AS avg_rating
    FROM decade_ratings
    GROUP BY publication_decade
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT book_id) >= 10
)
SELECT 
    publication_decade || 's' AS decade,
    unique_book_count,
    ROUND(avg_rating, 2) AS average_rating
FROM decade_book_counts
ORDER BY average_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

    SELECT 
        r.rating,
        r.purchase_id,
        FLOOR(CAST(SUBSTR(r.review_time, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) / 10) * 10 AS publication_decade

)

    COUNT(DISTINCT purchase_id) AS unique_book_count,
    ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) AS average_rating
FROM book_decade

ORDER BY average_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;"}

args.query:
WITH book_decade AS (
    SELECT 
        CAST(rating AS FLOAT) AS rating,
        purchase_id,
        FLOOR(CAST(SUBSTR(review_time, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) / 10) * 10 AS review_decade
    FROM review
)
SELECT 
    review_decade || 's' AS decade,
    COUNT(DISTINCT purchase_id) AS unique_book_count,
    ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) AS average_rating
FROM book_decade
GROUP BY review_decade
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT purchase_id) >= 10
ORDER BY average_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;
